name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
resistance_profile: With dumbbells, tension is lowest at the bottom and highest near horizontal; cables load the bottom (lengthened) portion better.
rom_notes: Raise to roughly shoulder height; the very top adds little tension. Control the lowering phase.
cues: Lead with the elbows, not the hands
Slight forward lean loads the side delt more
common_errors: Going too heavy and shortening the range
progressions: Switch to a cable for better lengthened tension
